title: Ceylon Tea Lion Logo – Symbol of Quality
description: The Lion Logo is the symbol of 100% pure Ceylon Tea. This certification confirms that every tea pack under Mist & Ember Exports is grown, manufactured, and packed entirely in Sri Lanka, maintaining the highest purity and authenticity.

title: Ozone Friendly Pure Ceylon Tea
issuer: Sri Lanka Tea Board – Ozone Friendly Programme
description: Mist & Ember Exports proudly supports environmental sustainability through the Ozone Friendly Pure Ceylon Tea certification. It ensures that no ozone-depleting substances are used in the production and packaging processes.

title: Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP)
description: Mist & Ember Exports complies with internationally recognized GMP standards, ensuring that every stage of tea processing and packaging follows strict hygiene and safety controls to deliver premium quality products.

title: ISO 22000:2018 – Food Safety Management
description: This certification demonstrates that Mist & Ember Exports follows a robust and internationally recognized food safety management system, guaranteeing safe, traceable, and high-quality tea for global markets.

title: HACCP Certified – Hazard Analysis & Critical Control Points
description: HACCP certification confirms that Mist & Ember Exports identifies and controls all potential food safety hazards at every step of the tea production process, ensuring maximum product safety and consistency.
